tasks.check: deno check src/index.ts src/test.ts scripts/run.workflow.ts scripts/preview.weixin.ts scripts/doctor.ts
tasks.verify: deno task fmt:check && deno task lint && deno task check && deno task test
tasks.build:windows: deno compile -A --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output trendFinder.exe --icon ./docs/images/main.ico --include src/modules/render/weixin/templates src/test.ts
tasks.build:mac-x64: deno compile -A --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output trendFinder-mac-x64 --include src/modules/render/weixin/templates src/test.ts
tasks.build:mac-arm64: deno compile -A --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output trendFinder-mac-arm64 --include src/modules/render/weixin/templates src/test.ts
tasks.build:linux-x64: deno compile -A --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output trendFinder-linux-x64 --include src/modules/render/weixin/templates src/test.ts
tasks.build:linux-arm64: deno compile -A --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --output trendFinder-linux-arm64 --include src/modules/render/weixin/templates src/test.ts
tasks.build:all: deno task build:windows && deno task build:mac-x64 && deno task build:mac-arm64 && deno task build:linux-x64 && deno task build:linux-arm64
